name: Jackery Explorer 1000 Plus Portable Power Station
introText: The Jackery Explorer 1000 Plus offers 1264Wh with 2000W output and expandable battery capacity — the best Jackery power station for family camping and home backup at $1,099 CAD.
whatWorks: 2000W AC output handles most RV and home appliances — runs a microwave (1000W), electric grill (1500W), and portable AC unit simultaneously — more headroom than the EcoFlow DELTA 2's 1800W.
Expandable with Jackery battery packs — the 1000 Plus supports capacity expansion, doubling its runtime for extended off-grid use.
worthKnowing: AC charging takes 1.7 hours (slower than EcoFlow) — Jackery's charging speed is good but slower than EcoFlow's X-Stream at 80 minutes. For fast turnaround scenarios, EcoFlow wins.
Jackery has the largest retail presence in Canada — available at Canadian Tire, REI Canada, and online with strong in-country warranty support.

commonComplaints.title: AC charging slower than EcoFlow competitors
commonComplaints.body: 1.7 hours to 80% is good but the EcoFlow DELTA 2 achieves the same in 80 minutes. Time-sensitive recharging favors EcoFlow.

commonComplaints.title: Heavier than DELTA 2 with less capacity per kg
commonComplaints.body: The Explorer 1000 Plus weighs 14.1kg for 1264Wh; the DELTA 2 is 12kg for 1024Wh. The weight-to-capacity ratio is similar but the form factor is bulkier.

commonComplaints.title: App is functional but basic
commonComplaints.body: Jackery's app provides monitoring and control but has fewer smart features than EcoFlow's app for scheduling and energy management.

verdict: The Jackery Explorer 1000 Plus is the best choice for Jackery loyalists and buyers who want wide Canadian retail availability — it offers 2000W output, expandable capacity, and LFP longevity. For pure performance and charging speed, the EcoFlow DELTA 2 at $100 less still leads.

realBuyers.quote: Bought at Canadian Tire with a warranty I trust. Works perfectly for our annual camping trip. Powers the whole family.
2000W surge handles our portable AC. Nothing else in this price range could do that.
LFP battery means this thing should last 10 years. Best long-term investment in emergency prep I've made.

metaDescription: Jackery Explorer 1000 Plus review Canada: 1264Wh LFP, 2000W output, expandable. $1,099 CAD. Best Jackery power station for Canadian camping and home backup.
